canonical_definition: Token-Focused Disparity Probing, a methodology for auditing autoregressive LLMs using single-token masked prediction on minimally contrastive sentence pairs, integrating multi-scale semantic alignment and disparity metrics (PS, PSD, WFS).
papers: Large Language Models Meet Knowledge Graphs for Question Answering: Synthesis and Opportunities
